title: Crimea: Today we remember and honor the memory of all the victims of one of...

title_uk: Крим: Сьогодні ми згадуємо та вшановуємо пам'ять усіх жертв одного з...
description: Today we remember and honor the memory of all the victims of one of the most brutal crimes of the Soviet government - the deportation of the Crimean Tatar people. Deportation, which became an act of obvious genocide against the Crimean Tatar people. The year 1944 will forever be in history as an attempt to destroy the people - when both children and adults were thrown out of their homes and sent to a foreign land. A large part of the people died in...
description_en: Today we remember and honor the memory of all the victims of one of the most brutal crimes of the Soviet government - the deportation of the Crimean Tatar people. Deportation, which became an act of obvious genocide against the Crimean Tatar people. The year 1944 will forever be in history as an attempt to destroy the people - when both children and adults were thrown out of their homes and sent to a foreign land. A large part of the people died in...
description_uk: Сьогодні ми згадуємо і вшановуємо памʼять усіх жертв одного з найбільш жорстоких злочинів радянської влади – депортації Кримськотатарського народу. Депортації, яка стала актом очевидного геноциду проти Кримськотатарського народу. 1944 рік назавжди буде в історії як спроба знищити народ – коли і малих, і дорослих викинули з рідного дому та відправили в чужий край. Значна частина народу загинула в...

description: Ukraine is developing a cruise missile with a flight range of up to 2,000 km and a warhead weight of up to 250 kg Ukrainian company Destinus together with German Rheinmetall are developing a new RUTA Block 3 cruise missile. Previously, Destinus had already supplied the Ukrainian Armed Forces with light cruise missiles RUTA Block 1 with a range of up to 300 km and a warhead weight of up to 150 kg, and also began testing its modified version of the RUTA Block 2 with...

description_uk: Украина разрабатывает крылатую ракету с дальностью полета до 2000 км и массой боевой части до 250 кг Украинская компания Destinus совместно с немецкой Rheinmetall ведут разработку новой крылатой ракеты RUTA Block 3. Ранее Destinus уже поставляла ВСУ легкие крылатые ракеты RUTA Block 1 с дальностью до 300 км и массой БЧ до 150 кг, а также начала испытания ее модифицированной версии RUTA Block 2 с...

title: Kyiv: 22 missiles + 524 drones intercepted
description: At least 2 killed, 49 injured in Russian attacks across Ukraine over past day. Russia launched 524 drones and 22 missiles, including 14 ballistic missiles, Ukraine's Air Force said. Of them, 503 drones and 4 missiles were shot down. Direct hits by 18 missiles and 16 drones were recorded at 34 locations.
description_en: At least 2 killed, 49 injured in Russian attacks across Ukraine over past day. Russia launched 524 drones and 22 missiles, including 14 ballistic missiles, Ukraine's Air Force said. Of them, 503 drones and 4 missiles were shot down. Direct hits by 18 missiles and 16 drones were recorded at 34 locations.
description_uk: At least 2 killed, 49 injured in Russian attacks across Ukraine over past day. Russia launched 524 drones and 22 missiles, including 14 ballistic missiles, Ukraine's Air Force said. Of them, 503 drones and 4 missiles were shot down. Direct hits by 18 missiles and 16 drones were recorded at 34 locations.

description: May 18 is the Day of Remembrance of the Victims of the Genocide of the Crimean Tatar People 82 years ago, at 3 o'clock in the morning on May 18, 1944, soldiers and operatives of the NKVD broke into the houses of the Crimean Tatars. While the men were fighting at the front, women, children and the elderly were forced out of their homes, giving the assembly only a few minutes. People were herded into freight cars and taken thousands of kilometers from the Motherland - to...
description_en: May 18 is the Day of Remembrance of the Victims of the Genocide of the Crimean Tatar People 82 years ago, at 3 o'clock in the morning on May 18, 1944, soldiers and operatives of the NKVD broke into the houses of the Crimean Tatars. While the men were fighting at the front, women, children and the elderly were forced out of their homes, giving the assembly only a few minutes. People were herded into freight cars and taken thousands of kilometers from the Motherland - to...
description_uk: 18 травня – День пам'яті жертв геноциду кримськотатарського народу 82 роки тому, о 3 годині ранку 18 травня 1944 року, в будинки кримських татар увірвалися солдати та оперативники НКВС. Поки чоловіки воювали на фронті, жінок, дітей та літніх людей насильно вигнали з домівок, давши на збори лічені хвилини. Людей загнали у товарні вагони і відвезли за тисячі кілометрів від Батьківщини – до...

title: Casualties reported
description: Dear reservists! We sincerely congratulate you on the Day of the Reservist of Ukraine! This holiday is a symbol of your loyalty to the oath to the Ukrainian people, your readiness to stand up and defend your native land. It is on May 18 that we honor those who fulfilled their military duty and did not leave the service of Ukraine, but kept their fighting spirit, skills and responsibility for its future. Since 2015, with the beginning of the formation...

This holiday is a symbol of your loyalty to the oath to the Ukrainian people, your readiness to stand up and defend your native land. It is on May 18 that we honor those who fulfilled their military duty and did not leave the service of Ukraine, but kept their fighting spirit, skills and responsibility for its future. description_uk: Шановні воїни-резервісти! Щиро вітаємо вас із Днем резервіста України! Це свято є символом вашої відданості присязі українському народові, готовності стати до строю та захистити рідну землю. Саме 18 травня ми вшановуємо тих, хто виконав свій військовий обов’язок та не залишив службу Україні, а зберіг бойовий дух, навички і відповідальність за її майбутнє. Із 2015 року, з початком формування...

title: Zaporizhzhia: 4 missiles intercepted
description: 4 MISSILES AND 503 ENEMY UAVS SHOT DOWN/SUPPRESSED On the night of May 18 (from 18:00 on May 17), the enemy launched a combined attack on the territory of Ukraine using attack UAVs and land-based missiles. The main direction of the attack is Dnipro and Dnipropetrovsk region. Odeshchyna, Chernihiv Oblast, and Zaporizhzhia were also attacked. ❗️ A total of 546 devices were recorded by the radio engineering troops of the Air Force...

title: Dnipro: 18 injured
description: Update: Russian drones, missiles strike residential buildings in multiple Ukrainian regions, injuring at least 20. The number of injured victims in Russia's overnight attack on Ukraine has risen to 20, including 18 injured victims stemming from an attack on a residential building in Dnipro, officials reported.
description_en: Update: Russian drones, missiles strike residential buildings in multiple Ukrainian regions, injuring at least 20. The number of injured victims in Russia's overnight attack on Ukraine has risen to 20, including 18 injured victims stemming from an attack on a residential building in Dnipro, officials reported.
description_uk: Update: Russian drones, missiles strike residential buildings in multiple Ukrainian regions, injuring at least 20. The number of injured victims in Russia's overnight attack on Ukraine has risen to 20, including 18 injured victims stemming from an attack on a residential building in Dnipro, officials reported.

title: Dnipro: Attack attack on residential area
title_en: Dnipro: Attack attack on residential area
description: Update: Russian attack on central, southern Ukraine injures at least 12. The number of injured victims in an overnight Russian attack on Dnipro has risen to nine people, including a child, Dnipropetrovsk Oblast Governor Oleksandr Hanzha reported. Three others were also injured in Odesa in an attack on a residential building overnight.
description_en: Update: Russian attack on central, southern Ukraine injures at least 12. The number of injured victims in an overnight Russian attack on Dnipro has risen to nine people, including a child, Dnipropetrovsk Oblast Governor Oleksandr Hanzha reported. Three others were also injured in Odesa in an attack on a residential building overnight.
description_uk: Update: Russian attack on central, southern Ukraine injures at least 12. The number of injured victims in an overnight Russian attack on Dnipro has risen to nine people, including a child, Dnipropetrovsk Oblast Governor Oleksandr Hanzha reported. Three others were also injured in Odesa in an attack on a residential building overnight.

title: Kryvyi Rih: Drone incoming
description: A new group of UAVs from the Black Sea ➡️ to Odesa. 🛵 BpLA group from Kherson Region ➡️ course to Kryvyi Rih. 🛵 BpLA in Dnipropetrovsk region ➡️ course to Pavlograd, Chaplin. 🛵 UAV in the east of Kharkiv Oblast ➡️ heading for Chuguiv. 🛵 BpLA in the north of Sumy region ➡️ heading to Krolevets. 🛵 Several groups of BpLA in the north of Chernihiv region ➡️ heading for Chernihiv, Horodnia, Slavutych. 🛵 BpLA in Zhytomyr Oblast ➡️ heading for Zviagel.
description_en: A new group of UAVs from the Black Sea ➡️ to Odesa. 🛵 BpLA group from Kherson Region ➡️ course to Kryvyi Rih. 🛵 BpLA in Dnipropetrovsk region ➡️ course to Pavlograd, Chaplin. 🛵 UAV in the east of Kharkiv Oblast ➡️ heading for Chuguiv. 🛵 BpLA in the north of Sumy region ➡️ heading to Krolevets. 🛵 Several groups of BpLA in the north of Chernihiv region ➡️ heading for Chernihiv, Horodnia, Slavutych. 🛵 BpLA in Zhytomyr Oblast ➡️ heading for Zviagel.
description_uk: Нова група БпЛА з Чорно моря ➡️ на Одещину. 🛵 Група БпЛА з Херсонщини ➡️ курсом на Кривий Ріг. 🛵 БпЛА на Дніпропетровщині ➡️ курсом на Павлоград, Чаплине. 🛵 БпЛА на сході Харківщини ➡️ курсом на Чугуїв. 🛵 БпЛА на півночі Сумщини ➡️ курсом на Кролевець. 🛵 Кілька груп БпЛА на півночі Чернігівщини ➡️ курсом на Чернігів, Городню, Славутич. 🛵 БпЛА на Житомирщині ➡️ курсом на Звягель.

description_uk: Сьогодні дуже масштабно Сили оборони України, наша Служба безпеки України, наша розвідка відпрацювали по Московському регіону. title: On the Day of Remembrance of the Victims of Political Repression, we...
title_en: On the Day of Remembrance of the Victims of Political Repression, we...
title_uk: У День пам'яті жертв політичних репресій ми...
description: On the Day of Remembrance of the Victims of Political Repression, we honor the millions of people destroyed by the Soviet totalitarian regime. Mass arrests, torture, extrajudicial executions, deportations and politically motivated persecution have become tragedies for generations of Ukrainians. Bykivnia, Demyaniv Laz, Pyatikhatky, Rutchenkove Pole and dozens of other places throughout Ukraine and outside our country are evidence of tragedies,...
description_en: On the Day of Remembrance of the Victims of Political Repression, we honor the millions of people destroyed by the Soviet totalitarian regime. Mass arrests, torture, extrajudicial executions, deportations and politically motivated persecution have become tragedies for generations of Ukrainians. Bykivnia, Demyaniv Laz, Pyatikhatky, Rutchenkove Pole and dozens of other places throughout Ukraine and outside our country are evidence of tragedies,...
description_uk: У День пам’яті жертв політичних репресій ми вшановуємо мільйони людей, знищених радянським тоталітарним режимом. Масові арешти, катування, розстріли без суду, депортації та переслідування за політичними мотивами стали трагедіями для поколінь українців. Биківня, Дем’янів Лаз, П’ятихатки, Рутченкове поле та десятки інших місць по всій Україні та за межами нашої держави є свідченнями трагедій,...
